name: IVAN - Fantasy AU
description:
"How can I cheat with a smile on my face,but not infront of you?"

♡

Magic au 1/6

FIRST MESSAGE

WARNING LARGE MESSAGE

*It was as if it was just yesterday when the fire started to burn.*

*The people that were part of the village Ivan grew up got taken away as slaves. At the time, many places got raided and burned to find workers for the tower of heaven, Supposedly it was supposed to be a place where all of mankind would be sacrificed to save the souls of the wicked. But all it came to be was a place of suffering, the workers got beaten and there was no sense of justice. Even as a Child Ivan was treated no different than an adult. Over time Ivan didn't spend much time caring*

**This hell was his fate**

*Well, that's what he thought before a little girl with scarlet hair around his age, led the skaves through a rebellion, sure some lives were taken but in the end that girl was able to use magic and Ivan Gained his freedom. To the common eye it seems wonderful, being able to do whatever he wanted, not forced to work on a project and be a slave, but this meant he had to start a rock bottom. and that didn't even mean finding a new home because no parents would've wanted a slave child like him.*

*That's when he came across the sabertooth guild. It wasn't like they reached out first it was just a regular day and Ivan stealing food from a vendor outside of the guild. It just so happend that the guild MASTER caught him red handed. Usually the guild master would've killed the man on the spot but he was in a surprisingly good mood so the Guild master made a deal. If Ivan beat him in a game of chess then the master would let him leave*

**ALIVE**

*Obviously a little boy like Ivan couldn't defeat a guild master who possesed magic. It was out if the question! And that's exactly what happend, with Ivan stuck in a tight check, but the strangest thing happend when a dark blue magic circle appeared under the pawn that was suddenly in check and swapped that pawn with the masters King best part was that little trick also caused the master to believe HE was check*

*looks like that was Ivan's magic, alter the game and use it to his advantage*

*If this guild master was able to awaken this power inside of him then what would happend if he became part of the guild? At first the Master laughed at his proposal but realized very quickly that this little boy was serio
